summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kenya Challenge app's redesigned 2-part signup process and onboarding flow. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend signup and login working correctly with full_name field implementation.

authentication_issues.issue: Session expires quickly preventing profile page testing

incomplete_testing.issue: Unable to complete all 5 onboarding steps due to session management

passed_tests: Backend API: POST /api/auth/signup accepts full_name field
Backend API: Login returns full_name correctly (John Walker)
Backend API: Profile has no first_name field, uses full_name
Backend API: Challenges, walker-types, achievement-levels endpoints work
Frontend: Signup page has Full Name field (not First Name)
Frontend: Signup page has no Country field
Frontend: Signup page has Display Name (optional) field
Frontend: Signup page Password has show/hide toggle icon
Frontend: Signup page Confirm Password has show/hide toggle
Frontend: Signup page shows 'Already have an account? Log in' link
Frontend: Login page Password has show/hide toggle icon
Frontend: Signup redirects to /onboarding after successful registration
Frontend: Dashboard shows full_name correctly (Habari greeting)
Frontend: Onboarding Step 1 shows available challenges to select
Password toggle functionality works on both signup and login
Teams search API returns results correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (25/25 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (most core features working, some incomplete due to session issues)
action_item_for_main_agent: Session management needs improvement - tokens expire too quickly preventing complete UI flow testing. Profile page access and full onboarding flow completion should be verified.
